query:
-- First, let's see the real appointments we want to keep
SELECT id, name, email, phone, program, scheduledTime, status 
FROM trialSignups 
WHERE email IN ('giannagozzo@gmail.com', 'adrienne747@gmail.com', 'hollysmiles5688@gmail.com')
   OR name IN ('Gianna Gozzo', 'Adrienne Kerns', 'Holly McIntosh')
ORDER BY scheduledTime DESC;

-- Delete all test entries (keeping real leads)
DELETE FROM trialSignups 
WHERE email NOT IN ('giannagozzo@gmail.com', 'adrienne747@gmail.com', 'hollysmiles5688@gmail.com')
  AND name NOT IN ('Gianna Gozzo', 'Adrienne Kerns', 'Holly McIntosh', 'Adrienne  Kerns ')
  AND (
    email LIKE '%test%' 
    OR email LIKE '%example.com%'
    OR name LIKE '%Test%'
    OR name LIKE '%Vincent%'
    OR name LIKE '%Vince%'
    OR name LIKE '%Kamil%'
    OR name = 'John Smith'
    OR name = 'Jane Doe'
    OR name = 'John Doe'
    OR name = 'Sarah Johnson'
    OR name = 'Sarah Martinez'
    OR name = 'Alex Johnson'
    OR name = 'Mike Chen'
    OR phone = '555-123-4567'
    OR phone = '555-987-6543'
    OR phone = '555-0123'
    OR phone = '555-0456'
    OR phone = '555-0789'
  );

-- Show remaining real appointments
SELECT id, name, email, phone, program, scheduledTime, status, introCountRequired, introCountCompleted
FROM trialSignups 
ORDER BY scheduledTime DESC;
